faqs.question: What pests are most common in Kips Bay apartments and buildings?
faqs.answer: Kips Bay residents most frequently deal with German cockroaches, house mice, pavement ants, and occasionally bed bugs. The neighborhood's older buildings often have cracks and gaps that allow pests easy entry, while proximity to restaurants and medical facilities increases pest activity. Our general pest control service targets all these common invaders with proven treatment methods.
